title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed code editor now integrates local AI model providers including LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp, enabling developers to run coding assistants on-device without cloud dependencies. The integration supports models like Gemma-4 12B and Qwen for code explanation, refactoring, and boilerplate generation while preserving code privacy.
